title: 🔤 Basic sentence reversal
description: Simple case with normal spacing between words 🧩.

title: ↔️ Leading and trailing spaces
description: Input contains extra spaces at the beginning and end ✂️.

title: 📏 Multiple spaces between words
description: Words are separated by more than one space 🔍.

title: 1️⃣ Single word
description: Only one word should remain unchanged after reversal 🔄.

title: 🌫️ Many spaces between two words
description: Large number of spaces between two words should be reduced ➡️ one.

title: 🔢 Words with numbers
description: Words may contain digits along with letters 🧪.

title: ➡️ Trailing spaces only
description: Spaces only at the end should be ignored ✂️.

title: ⬅️ Leading spaces only
description: Spaces only at the beginning should be ignored ✂️.

title: 📚 Multiple words (clean spacing)
description: Words separated by single spaces without extras ✅.

title: 🧪 Mixed spacing complexity
description: Combination of leading, trailing, and multiple spaces 🔄.
